roadmapStages.name: Ship Time
roadmapStages.summary: Persistent explorable home phase, preparation, crew and ship systems.
roadmapStages.evidence: Accepted decision baseline: Ship Time is an explorable home phase.

roadmapStages.name: Route Prospects
roadmapStages.summary: Consequential candidate destinations and route choice.
roadmapStages.evidence: Route Prospect and Route Choice vocabulary is accepted.

roadmapStages.name: Explore Location
roadmapStages.summary: Spatial, persistent locations assembled from validated modules.
roadmapStages.evidence: Location Assembly and Movement + Camera prototypes exist locally.

roadmapStages.name: Dialogue + Checks
roadmapStages.summary: Game-native dialogue, visible Lattice checks, and validated outcomes.
roadmapStages.evidence: Decision baseline replaces primary DM chat with in-world interaction.

roadmapStages.name: Tactical Resolution
roadmapStages.summary: Location-wide turn-based pressure, AP/MP/reactions, and committed outcomes.
roadmapStages.evidence: Movement/camera prototype exists; tactical contracts remain open.

roadmapStages.name: Aftermath + Recruitment
roadmapStages.summary: Persistent local aftermath, roster consequences, and recruitment.
roadmapStages.evidence: Product language is accepted; implementation contract is not yet framed.

roadmapStages.name: Return + Save
roadmapStages.summary: Route-node resolution, consequences, return to ship, and recoverable saves.
roadmapStages.evidence: Recoverable local save work is recorded; revised alignment requires reconciliation.
